description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
**********************************************************************
Check out our other social media and product links:
https://linktr.ee/shedflips
**********************************************************************

Come pack 16 eBay orders with us, step by step! In this packing session we ship out a $120 Medicube AGE-R Booster Pro skincare device (a $60 garage sale flip), a vintage Transformers Grimlock Robots In Disguise carded action figure, a GI Joe Valor vs Venom General Abernathy & Over Kill set, Dansko Dixie Sandals, a 10-book hardcover Bookshelf For Boys And Girls lot, a lot of 5 G.K. Chesterton mystery paperbacks, a SELOC Mercury Mariner 1990-2000 outboard repair manual, an OVENTE 7" lighted wall-mount makeup mirror, It Cosmetics TAN Celebration foundation, a Sarah Coventry Concho Link bracelet, a 1976 Baton Rouge Cougars minor league baseball team photo, a Parker Seals O-ring kit, a US Army long sleeve t-shirt, our own Shed Flips refrigerator magnet, and a Brighton Initial bracelet charm bundle going international. Plus our first impressions of the Ray-Ban Meta glasses, a full eBay International Shipping (EIS) explainer, and a debate on the 5x / 10x reseller pricing rule.

CHAPTERS
0:00 Intro & Ray-Ban Meta Glasses Chat (Pack 1: Parker Seals O-Ring Kit + Pack 2: SELOC Mariner Repair Manual packed in background)
9:04 Pack 3: Lot of 5 G.K. Chesterton Mystery Paperbacks (Media Mail debate)
12:01 Pack 4: US Army Long Sleeve T-Shirt 2XL
14:53 Pack 5: GI Joe Valor vs Venom Action Figure
18:12 Pack 6: Dansko Dixie Sandals (USPS Ground Advantage shoe box)
20:09 Pack 7: Bookshelf For Boys And Girls 10-Book Hardcover Lot
21:30 Pack 8: Sarah Coventry Concho Link Bracelet
23:21 Pack 9: It Cosmetics TAN Celebration Foundation
24:55 Pack 10: Transformers Grimlock Robots In Disguise
28:31 Pack 11: OVENTE 7" Lighted Makeup Mirror
29:03 eBay International Shipping (EIS) Explainer
34:22 Pack 12: $120 Medicube AGE-R Booster Pro Skincare Device
36:24 The 5x / 10x Reseller Pricing Rule Debate
38:55 Pack 13: 1976 Baton Rouge Cougars Baseball Team Photo
41:03 Pack 14: Shed Flips Refrigerator Magnet (Mark's International Order)
